entry.title: Re: Incorrect documentation regarding "Error Sanitization"?
entry.content: It seems that this problem still exists.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Trial Container FAIL: process disp+work Dispatcher not running
entry.content:
Hello @philippschuck 

I have the same issue when installing the latest ABAPTRIAL_2202 release. Are you able to resolve them?

entry.title: print open lines sales order sap b1 using crystal report
entry.content:
Dear all,

I got a question about printing open lines after making AR invoice.

If we are printing a sales order after making an AR invoice, it prints all the lines also the ones which are already printed on the invoice.

How can we only print the open lines which didn't have been put on the invoice? 

For printing we use Crystal reports.

Please advise,

Regards

Mark Oenema

#sap b1

entry.title: Issue with retrieving job details of onboardee (new hire)
entry.content: Hello, i am trying to get the job details of an onboardee (new hire) before they get hired in EC. Once onboardee personal information and hire details are entered in ONB 'Review New Hire Data' & 'Provide Additional Data Step', i can see EmpEmployment details, National ID, Email, and Phone number, however PerPersonal (Biographical) and EmpJob (Job Informaition) entities are missing when querying using OData or Integration Center.

entry.title: Re: how to do GI in the Q stock from the upper lever WBS...
entry.content: If you don't want to post the transfer posting first then do the GI from the second WBS you will need to use Requirements Grouping. All of the requirements, GRs, and GIs will be through the Grouping WBS.

entry.title: Re: reading external (OData) API from cap
entry.content:
Here are some resources that might help you:

  • CAP documentation on extending a remote service by a local service
  • SAP Developers tutorial on consuming external services with CAP

entry.title: Re: SQL Syntax error
entry.content:
Thank you for your reply. As advised, I entered HANA SQL script in the below Code.

METHOD amdp_procedure by database procedure for hdb language HANA sqlscript options read-only.

I am getting the error as "HANA" is not valid. All BW transformations are AMDP procedures and i feel i need to create AMDP class to use it in BW transformations.

If possible, pls provide a sample Code.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP 2021 - How do you update the new Phase/Subphase fields programmatically?
entry.content: Did anyone tried changing Phase & Subphase for order or operations? Any solution to this?

entry.title: Change material cost in Sales return process during PGR
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have an urgent query - during sales return delivery and PGR (Post goods receipt) below mentioned entry is posted:

Inventory Dr.

COGS Cr. 

My client requirement is to change this amount - COGS amount as per decided value. This can vary for each material.

Any standard solution / customized solution using ABAP will be accepted. Please guide in this regard. 

Just to reiterate it is quite urgent. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Approver based on dynamic task determination.
entry.content:
Hello @AyushiS , 

There are no specific blog that covers this. You can use this tutorial to learn about basic of building Decision or you can also follow my blog.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office – Storage of workbooks
entry.content:
@ nsatishreddy21 Please use SP18 or higher. The type must be Analysis workbook then

@Agata For workbook variants we have a SAC dependency and this is currently not planned.

entry.title: Re: What table is utilized to save Subscription Contract...
entry.content:
Hi Gilberto,

 

This is most probably not a technical issue where you need to debug, but a configuration/replication issue that you can troubleshoot in other ways. 

Depending on your version, go to your ERP system (ECC or S4HANA) and check why those contracts failed replication. You can do so by using tcode FKKCC_PC_MON, this would be the first step to understand what is going on. Depending on the case you can restart the distribution or re send some missing master data via other transactions.

BR, Pablo Riesco

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Short Update: 

-e EXPERIMENTAL_DOCKER_DESKTOP_FORCE_QEMU=1

Parameter will trigger execution of the image with QEMU instead of Rosetta2  in native Mac environment but leads to the old problems executing without utm. summarized, it doesn't help.

entry.title: INTEGRATION CENTER | SFTP DESTINATION without port number 22 can't be selected in Integration Center
entry.content:
With H1 2024 release in SAP SuccessFactors, there is once again the SFTP PORT NUMBER issue coming back again on top of the Integration Center Destination area.

SAP have not deleted any existing configuration which contains SFTP destinations with port number different than 22.

the change is more suttle : with the new release it's now impossible to select a multiple destination value which have port number different than 22.

I hope it's only a bug from SAP side because having to re-explain the criticality of using a SFTP server with a port number different than 22 in each release is becoming enoying.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation -Unable to add Attended Trigger
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

We are working on BTP Trial version for SAP Build Process Automation offering. We have downloaded SAP Build Process Automation desktop agent and deployed a project to our environment. We don't have desktop Studio installed. Now , when we attempt to add an attended  trigger to our project , we are unable to see our project in drop down and we see a prompt -You can only create an attended trigger for projects with automations and a project launcher. Please refer screen shot for details.

 

Could you please let us know , how can we navigate through the issue ?

 

Thanks & Regards

Amit Kulkarni

entry.title: Re: Ho to show/hide buttons and table controllers based on conditions set in the groovy script?
entry.content:
Hi Kashvi_Anaisha,

Unfortunately we don't have scripting methods to show/hide 'Add', 'Delete' and 'Select All' on Table Controllers.

These options can be either always turned on or off on entire Table Controller (in Setup->Fields and Forms -> Custom Fields , then find desired Table Controller, click Edit, then click Customise Table Controller)

Best regards

Lana

entry.title: Proration of flat rate
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm facing the below situation:

We have a flat price maintained in the system with time category as Month ($12/month). Price operand is maintained in the Rate cat level.

A factor operand is maintained in the Installation level and LUMSUM01 is used in the rate with period control 02. 

Let's say, there is a billing period with dates 01/01/2024 to 31/01/2024. Factor value is 0 from 01/01/2024 to 10/01/2024 and factor value is 1 from 11/01/2024 to 31/01/2024. 

In this scenario, system is completely ignoring the price and customer is not charged for 20 days ($8). However, if the contract is moved in on 11/01/2024 and first bill period is valid from 11/01/2024 to 31/01/2024, then proration is happening and customer is getting charged for $8. 

Could you please suggest what change needs to be done if we want to charge the customer for $8 (proration to happen) for the 1st sceanrio?

entry.title: RAP: VH filter on child lvl based on value from parent entity
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have the following problem.

Our requirement is to build an application where it will be possible to create a group of suppliers for some purchasing organization and then on child level add suppliers to the group.

On the photo you can see a group created for Purchorg 1000.

 

Now i want to add suppliers to the group. For the field supplier i have created a VH. I need to take the value for PurchOrg from parent entity and based on it, display the VH. But it doesn't work. There is no value in the field PurchOrg.

I tried to do that in 2 ways with additional binding. Based on key field PurchOrg and based on association field. In both cases, it doesnt work.

After creation of new entry for supplier, the value for PurchOrg is passed. I think that at the time of creation these values are not filled. 

After creation the value is passed.

Anyone have an idea how can pass the values from parent entity into vh on the child lvl(entity).

 

Thanks!

entry.title: print settings issue
entry.content:
Hi,

We're encountering an issue with Crystal Reports 2013 and print settings. We have 10 different Zebra 231 and Zebra 411 network printers. When we modify print settings such as density, these changes aren't reflected in CR. Other applications like Word or even Notepad demonstrate this adjustment, but CR doesn't. We've attempted changing these settings both on the print server and on client PCs, yet the density and speed remain unchanged in CR. Where does CR retrieve these settings from?
Thanks

entry.title: Re: Building SAP Asset Manager Client (MDK-23.8.7 & MDK P...
entry.content:
@Pathik 
Native Script (Required Version == 8.6.1)

entry.title: Re: Python RAG sample for beginners using SAP HANA Cloud and SAP AI Core
entry.content: great read thanks for sharing

entry.title: Rewards and Recognition: Redemption of points by Expat employees
entry.content:
Hi Practitioners,

Seeking help in R&R, I am not sure about the redemption points.

In the case of expats getting a award in their physical location, what do they get ? The amount as per the local point value (let’s take an example of an expat From Singapore to India receiving a medal in India, does he/she get the value in INR based on INR point value or the value based in SGP to be converted in INR because the redemption will be done in India)?

If this Singaporean employee (contractually linked to Singapore) had a award before leaving India, what would be the amount of the Medal (value in SGP to be converted in INR or the amount based on INR value of Medal)?

If we have an expat from a country where the award is not deployed (Germany as sample), but received a award in India: what would be their entitlement ? based on the INR value of award.

entry.title: Re: How to use AI services to translate Picklists in SAP SuccessFactors - An example
entry.content: Yes!!!!! - perfect use case for AI. No need to worry about new or missing translations now. Thanks Ralph!!

entry.title: Re: Building SAP Asset Manager Client (MDK-23.8.7 & MDK Plugin SDK-2310.0.4) plugin error
entry.content:
@Pathik
Native Script (Required Version == 8.6.1)

entry.title: Re: Building SAP Asset Manager Client (MDK-23.8.7 & MDK Plugin SDK-2310.0.4) plugin error
entry.content: Native Script (Required Version == 8.6.1)

entry.title: Re: How create a session timeout with a countdown timer i...
entry.content:
Applications based on REST framework (eg SAPUI5 Fiori apps) are stateless, meaning they don't maintain a session in the backend. Every call to the backend is a brand new independent call, it knows nothing about what the user did previously. 

REST is different from GUI or Web Dynpro frameworks where you created a session in the backend as soon as a user logged in, and you could lock and unlock objects at will during the session. Fiori apps, like all new RESTful apps, are totally separated from the backend.

If you want to keep a timeout and log users off (ie. force them out of Fiori launchpad) you need to do it in the front-end  using Javascripts. There are lots of timer examples if you google for Javascript timers. Fiori Launchpad also has a timeout settings you can configure, but don't expect a ticking timer display for the user, and don't expect anything to happen in the backend.

entry.title: Working with SAFe Epics in the SAP Activate Discover phase
entry.content:
The second article in this series “Innovate Faster: The Power Duo of SAP Activate and Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) ” is explaining how the SAP solution implementation activities specific to SAP Activate Discover project phase should be executed in an organization using SAFe. 

This is where you can find the first article in the series : Innovate Faster: The Power Duo of SAP Activate and SAFe.

Simply put, both the SAP Activate Discover phase and the creation of Epics in SAFe share a common goal: to thoroughly outline and endorse the business case driving the implementation of the SAP solution.  Further elaboration on this point will be provided in the following lines. 

 

The key activities in the Discover phase help to crystallize the organization’s vision about the SAP solution implementation. They cover the creation of the SAP solution adoption strategy and the documentation of the Solution Implementation Value and Business Case as part of the customer organization's digital transformation roadmap. 

During the Discover activities, SAP Solution adoption paths are identified. In an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition solution context, for example, a company should decide which of the three possible paths is bringing the most value: system conversion, selective data transition or new implementation scenario. 

Refinement for the chosen implementation scenarios is conducted to answer SAP solution specific questions like, for example: 

  • How many systems are ideal for the to-be business scenarios? 
  • Is Co-Deployment preferred, or should we deploy standalone? 
  • What about IT-Security Requirements? 
  • What will be the sequence of co-deployment? 
  • What business processes should be covered by the solutions? 
  • What benefits will the business realize by deploying the new solution with standard processes? 
  • What do we need to do to keep the system ready for innovation? etc. 

Let’s see now how the SAP solution implementation vision, roadmap and adoption strategy generated by SAP Activate activities in the Discover phase are used by Lean Agile organizations that are implementing SAFe. In such organizations, technology efforts that were traditionally organized as projects are turned into a continuous flow of product-centric features in a value stream which timeline is exceeding the implementation project time and continues with improvements and product life cycle management activities until the product’s end of life. 

 SAFe provides practices for managing that flow using a construct called ‘Epics’.

An Epic, in SAFe, is corresponding to a solution implementation initiative that is supporting the organization’s vision and that will bring value to one of the organization’s operational value stream (OVS). You can see examples of such Epics in the European Medicines Agency published roadmap available in the references link. 

In a project-oriented approach, the Epic from SAFe corresponds to a project although the two concepts are operating quite differently (see below figure). SAP Activate guidelines for the project implementation should therefore be mapped and converted to the corresponding Epic elements of a Lean Agile enterprise.  

The obvious differences in the two approaches can be mitigated by adapting the scope, the sequence or the execution frequency of the activities recommended by SAP Activate Methodology. All the other differences illustrated in the below picture are not manifested in the SAP Activate project methodology as Agile practices are used to measure the progress and to implement the SAP solution that will be covered in the future articles in this series. 

In SAP Activate Discover phase tailoring is needed for the Business Case activities covering committed scope identification and cost estimation.  

Looking at typical the Business Case creation activities, if, for example, an organization implementing SAFe evaluates the opportunity to support the operational value stream that includes Procurement processes with the implementation of the SAP S4/HANA solution, an Epic that details this opportunity will be defined by the owner of the initiative, the Epic Owner, to cover: 

  • the value statement,  
  • the business outcomes,  
  • the leading indicators, and  
  • the most important nonfunctional requirements associated with this initiative.  

Due to their considerable scope and impact, the Epic requires the definition of a Minimum Viable Product (MVP) and the approval by Lean Portfolio Management (LPM) which is the approval and funding entity in an organization implementing SAFe.  

There are many similarities between the Epic Lean Business Case and the SAP Activate Value Case for solution implementation statement that is created during the Discover phase, as you can see in the figure below. 

 

 

 The SAP Activate Value Case documentation includes: 

  • the expected business outcomes and business success measurements (both predictive and lagging) are nothing else but the business outcome hypothesis and the corresponding leading indicators in the Epic’s Lean Business Case. 
  • the functionalities in scope and out of scope for the SAP solution as well as other solution level requirements like security, compliance, response time and data volumes etc. with a clear correspondence to the Epic’s Lean Business Case components. 
  • business capabilities that will be implemented by the SAP solution, expressed as SAP L2/L3 business processes in the solution scope; in an organization using SAFe, these processes correspond to the Features that will implement the Epic MVP. 

 

While SAFe is giving general recommendations for building the Lean Business Case, SAP Activate is detailing concrete, SAP solution-specific elements and activities for the business case creation. It also provides tools  and usage guidelines to perform the analysis necessary to fundament the Lean Business Case and helps to create a high-level design, through the design principles identified in the Value Case for SAP solution implementation. 

The activities in the SAP Activate Discover phase necessary to document the Value Case for solution implementation are showing how to decide and measure the benefits of adopting the SAP solution, like, for example, the organization of a Digital Value Discovery Workshop, in the scenario of an SAP S4/HANA solution adoption, that helps to document the expected Business Outcome of the Epic.  

Solution Discovery Workshop is another example of Discover activity that serves to the Epic MVP identification. In this workshop, the Epic Owner, the Business Owners, the Product Management, and the System Architect from the SAFe organization work together with SAP solution experts to: 

  • select the business capabilities available in the SAP solution that must be part of the MVP and of the MVP extension, 
  • identify integrations, and extensibility needed in the customer’s landscape, 
  • document any other requirements specific to the customer’s journey to SAP S/4HANA Cloud. 

For the Epic leading indicators and business outcome proper specification, SAP Activate provides solution-specific tools and accelerators like, for example, the use of SAP Signavio Process Insights application that helps customer organization to discover the value of moving to SAP S/4HANA, better understand their current business process performance and provide continuous monitoring, assessment, and improvement of their business processes. For further information about this application please check the article in the references. 

Based on the implementation scope elements included in the Epic Lean Business Case, a forecast estimation of the Epic duration is made by the organization in which is considered, if the case, the costs with Suppliers if they are participating in the Epic MVP implementation. 

Lean Agile Enterprises that implement SAFe evolved from the project funding model to the Epic funding model. When an Epic is created, the focus is set on the identification of the MVP functionalities expressed as Features, and on the MVP cost estimation. The Features in the MVP typically correspond to the minimalistic list of business processes to be implemented in the SAP Solution to support the Operational Value Streams (OVS). For the estimation of the implementation costs, as the level of details for the initiative is quite high at the Epic approval moment, the cost estimation is given as monetary range, as for example, between 1M and 1.5M for the Epic MVP. The range varies depending on the Epic and can be within hundreds of thousands or within millions or even tens or hundreds of millions. The same type of cost estimation is made for the Epic full implementation. 

The Epic investment often includes the contribution and cost from Suppliers (e.g., the team with deep expertise on SAP solution implementation), whether internal or external. Ideally, enterprises engage external suppliers via Agile contracts, which supports estimating the costs of a supplier’s contribution to a specific Epic. As only high-level scope definition is available at the Epic definition moment, a cost range estimation is expected from the Supplier as well, that is a lot different from the traditional project budgeting approach with fixed cost and scope. 

The implementation of an Epic follows an iterative approach and manages investment and risks in an incremental way. The Epic Owner will incrementally refine the total Epic implementation costs for the organization as the MVP is built and learning occurs. Once the Epic MVP implementation is finished, if the Epic benefit hypothesis is not proven, the investment into adding further features to the MVP and the corresponding investment (additional budget) is stopped. If the benefit hypothesis is proven, the Epic Owner works with the Agile teams to add functionalities to the solution using the WSJF (Weighted Shortest Job First) Feature prioritization technique until WSJF decides otherwise. 

In a project-based approach, the SAP solution implementation scope and effort estimation and, as well, the high-level solution implementation plan are attached to the project's contract and make possible the start of the implementation project. 

For an organization implementing SAFe, the SAP Activate Discover phase’s result corresponds to the Epic approval (Go/No-Go) decision. 

In the next article in this series, we will cover the execution of the activities corresponding to SAP Activate Prepare and Explore phases in a SAFe organization context.  

 

References: 

Network Portfolio Roadmap 2023-205 (europa.eu) 

SAP Signavio Process Insights - The fastest path to process improvements 

Create an Innovation Strategy and a High-Level Road Map - Roadmap Viewer (sap.com) 

Advanced Topic - Innovation Accounting in SAFe - Scaled Agile Framework 

Executing a SAP Digital Discovery Assessment - Roadmap Viewer (sap.com) 

Review and Request SAP Process Insights - Roadmap Viewer (sap.com) 

Government - Transitioning from Projects to a Lean Flow of Epics - Scaled Agile Framework 

Operational Value Streams - Scaled Agile Framework 

Epic - Scaled Agile Framework 

Advanced Topic - Agile Contracts - Scaled Agile Framework 

WSJF - Scaled Agile Framework 

 

Main Reviewer : @Seb_Ziegler

entry.title: How to get 101 and 261 mvt type proposals using BAPI_PRODORDCONF_GET_TT_PROP based on the Yield?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

    How to get 101 and 261 mvt type proposals using BAPI_PRODORDCONF_GET_TT_PROP based on the Yield provided in TimeTickets Table?

Ex:-) Production Order balance qty is 2 NOS against 3 NOS

         When I provide Yield as 1 in Time Ticket, I expected 101 mvt type and 261 mvt ype qty will be proposed in accordance with the Yield 1 NOS. But the system is providing 101 Mvt type and 261 mvt type qty for the balance production order,i.e., 2Nos.

Is there any other BAPI to get GR and GR proposal in accordance to the yield or Am I missing any field to update.

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: How to retrieve Amt in Transaction Curr, Amt in Company Code Curr, Amt in Group Curr fields.
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We are trying to get the three currency values for the supplier invoice line items. "Amount in Transaction Currency" "Amount in Company Code Currency" "Amount in Group Currency". We have explored both supplier invoice related CDS views journal entry related CDS views. The fields are not present in the supplier invoice CDS views. We are getting duplicates if we use the Journal entry and general ledger CDS views due to document splitting and aggregation of supplier line items in the journal entry level. Can you please let us know how to retrieve these three fields for supplier invoice line items

Thanks and Regards

Ruchi Kesharwani

entry.title: Re: TKS 4 - Scheduling – With or Without it?
entry.content:
How can the scheduling settings calculate the loading date/departure date from supplier in a freight unit created from an inbound delivery?

The main business objective is to know when (date) we have to go to pick up the goods from supplier (EXW conditions) to bring it to our factories.

entry.title: Re: Configuration steps of Dynamic actions
entry.content: Hi This document is not opening its 404 error

entry.title: Issue in Inventory Audit Report
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
We are facing an issue in the inventory audit report where the Item values are not matching as per the calculation.
 
After investigation, we found that this might be happening due to back dated entries created in the system.
 
As per System Date average cost is following:
 

 

As per Posting date Material is consumed at cost 132.71.
 
As per the posting date it should be consumed at 143.83.
 
Even though it is consumed at 143.83, the difference becomes 14780.86 instead of 71.86.
 
Please share your observations or any calculation method to fix this.

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content: as I said, you'd have to generate the transport yourself from a newer system.

entry.title: Re: How to add column based on existing columns to existing table without header line?
entry.content:
Ok I feel like I'm missing something here and I'm just being dense, but I genuinely don't see it😅. This is the specific error I get now (and i should have just copy pasted it here honestly):
The data object "<LINE>" does not have a component called "PERCENTAGE_AVAILABLE".
but I thought in my code it was making the 'percentage_available' component and adding things to that instead of looking for that component.

The seats_available name seems to be correct, as does seats_max, and the only name in the error is percentage_available which is (supposed to be) made at that moment. Honestly feels like I'm looking for a missing dot at this point and I'm sure once I see the mistake I'm gonna feel incredibly dumb, but I literally can't find it😅😂

entry.title: Re: How to build SOAP service in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: REST is a great option for many scenarios, but SOAP still has its place in the world. In our use case the Sender side was SAP ECC 6.0 and the programming framework there is more suitable for SOAP technology. The Receiver side was an e-shop, which is based on REST and so SCI served as some kind of a bridge between SOAP and REST.

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I believe I am qualified for the digital skills initiative as a recent veteran of the army of 15 years! I would like this opportunity to join this program because I love working with SAP and have been doing so for 15 years using SAP GCSSA. I would like to get a civilian certification for my new life outside the army.

Thank you for your consideration

Ryan

entry.title: Hide error message in C4C
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Need help in hiding the validation messages in C4C . This Date field is not defined as mandatory and empty values are sent , but below error message is thrown and the client wants to hide it as service order is created successfully .

In custom code there is no validation to restrict it , looks like standard validation is happening .

Kindly assist .

 

 

Regards,

Krithika

entry.title: SAP GTS classification not recorded at compliance document creation
entry.content: When we classify in SAP it happens in the product master. When customs compliance document is created the classification number is not recorded in the document instead it is recorded only in the product master.  So in the compliance document we do not have certainty over the HTN codes assigned to the product at the time of transaction. Why is this the case I'm interested in understanding if there's any reasonable business explanation; for instance we do block documents based on HTN code and these must be manually released, there is no historical record of the HTN code classified at the time in SAP standard; we will be looking to customise the system accordingly.

entry.title: Why Financial Health Reviews are Crucial in Supplier Evaluation
entry.content:
In the intricate dance of sourcing, contracts, purchasing, and managing the supply chain, there's a vital step that often gets overlooked: evaluating the financial health of your suppliers. It's akin to checking the pulse of your business partners, ensuring they're not just alive but thriving. This seemingly mundane task holds the key to safeguarding your organization against potential risks and fostering long-term, fruitful relationships. Let's dive into why financial health reviews should be a non-negotiable part of your procurement strategy.

First and foremost, financial stability serves as a solid indicator of a supplier's reliability. Just like a shaky foundation compromises the stability of a building, a supplier struggling with financial woes can jeopardize your operations. By scrutinizing their financial statements, you gain insights into their liquidity, profitability, and overall financial health. Are they consistently profitable? Do they have manageable debt levels? These are questions that need answers to ensure your supply chain remains robust and uninterrupted.

Moreover, financial health reviews act as a safeguard against unforeseen disruptions. Picture this: you've forged a partnership with a supplier, only to find out later that they're on the brink of bankruptcy. Suddenly, your supply chain is thrown into disarray, deadlines are missed, and costs skyrocket as you scramble to find alternative solutions. Conducting regular financial assessments allows you to identify red flags early on, giving you ample time to mitigate risks and implement contingency plans. It's akin to having a safety net beneath the tightrope of business operations.

This blog series with RapidRatings will dig into these topics to help you build a better understanding of supplier financial health as it relates to risk.

#1: Use financial health to reveal and predict supplier risk

Understanding the financial health of suppliers is foundational to understanding supply chain exposure across all risk domains. Better risk assessment decisions result from accurate, trusted data. Supplier financial statements are the most accurate measure of financial health and an excellent predictor of supply chain disruption.

#2: Analyze Global Trends in Frequency of Supply Chain Disruptions

Analysis of the current macro environment and the forces driving increased incidence in supply chain disruption. Looking at using supplier financial health to forecast potential disruption or points of weakness in supply chains. Deep dive into the data across key manufacturing sectors to see where risk concentrations lie.

#3: Collaborate Transparently with Suppliers

Cultivating trust and transparency with suppliers is essential to strong business relationships and reliability. Clients can pull several levers to help critical suppliers with financial challenges including adjusting payment terms or using an escrow. Openness also surfaces opportunities to expand contracts with suppliers who have additional capacity. Financial Dialogue Report is a discussion framework that helps clients hold constructive conversations with their suppliers to deepen their understanding of financial challenges or explore contract expansion opportunities.

#4: Understand the cost and of supply chain disruption

Focus on the cost of disruption as it relates to specific industries in the manufacturing sector. The data analyzed will cover sectors including automotive, aerospace, tech and defense. This data will be paired with frequency trend data to provide comprehensive insights.

#5: Enact End-to-End Due Diligence in Supply Chain

End-to-end due diligence is crucial for supply chain risk management from selection to segmentation and management. This blog explores the benefits of incorporating assessment criteria such as financial health and ratings from the supplier evaluation stage right through the entire lifecycle of the supplier relationship. 

Integrating financial health reviews into your supplier evaluation and source to pay processes is not just prudent; it's imperative for long-term success.

entry.title: Re: Working Time Account v TOIL Account in Time Sheet
entry.content:
Small correction: you need to set the factor in the input time type group.

The factor in the result time type group that posts to the working time account is not possible.

But in the end, the result is the same: it can be achieved.

entry.title: Re: SAP_Condition Contract_Spreading fixed amount accrual...
entry.content:
Hi @pierpaolo_parma, 

SAP provides standard base value formula 214 for Fixed amount calculation. 

This formula calculates the proportional value of the fixed amount from the ratio of the settlement period and the condition contract validity. Two cases are distinguished: Both, the current settlement date and the final settlement date are at month's end date. Then the ratio is calculated in accordance with the number of months. In all other cases, the ratio is calculated in accordance with the number of days. 


In your case, you'll have to copy the formula 214 and change the logic of factors calculation, specifically copy the method "_GET_FACTORS_FIXED_AMOUNT" and adjust your method X as you need. 

FYI: This logic of pro-rata calculation is only for Delta accrual and not for Partial Settlement. 
Feel free to contact me on LinkedIn, I believe we are already connected. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - Unable to load Factory
entry.content: How?

entry.title: Re: Bulgaria moving to EURO
entry.content: Is there a SAP Jam site available as per the Croatia EUR conversion?

entry.title: RAP dump: Frontend Error: Resource not found for the segment 'Delete_mc'.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I created a behavior definition, and it is working fine properly but after adding the "delete" the program dumped

This is the dump details

Frontend Error: Resource not found for the segment 'Delete_mc'., Service: /SAP/-ZUI_AJ_SD_MAIN2_V2-0001

what does that mean and how can I fix this?

CDS behavior definition

 

managed; 
strict ( 2 );

define behavior for ZI_AJ_SD_VBAK2 alias VBAKBDef
implementation in class ZCL_BP_I_AJ_SD_VBAK2 unique
persistent table VBAK
lock master
authorization master ( instance )
//etag master <field_name>
{
  field ( readonly ) SalesOrderID;

  create;
//  update;
  delete;
  association _ZI_AJ_SD_LIPS2 { create; }
  association _ZI_AJ_SD_VBAP2 { create; }


  mapping for vbak {
       // CDS field   =  table field
      SalesOrderID      = vbeln;
      SalesDocType      = auart;
      DocumentDate      = audat;
      SalesOrg          = vkorg;
      DistChnl          = vtweg;
      Division          = spart;
      RDD               = vdatu;
      PurchaseOrder     = bstnk;
      SalesDocCategory  = vbtyp;
  }

}
//  behavior definition for VBAP and LIPS

entry.title: How to enter project budget with active UPA
entry.content: In our system UPA is active and we wnt to enter a project budget with CJ30. This is not possible as we receive the error "Function not possible as UPA is active". so now we need a new solution to enter the projects budget. We know that we can use the financial data import as a work around, but there should be an app to maintain the budget manually.

entry.title: Re: How to deploy SAP Service and Asset Manager metadata definitions to Mobile Services
entry.content:
Hi @Arunachalam ,

This is a great blog explaining the required steps for SAM Metadata definitions.

In my case, I am deploying SAM 2205 version. I have followed the same steps mentioned here. However, I face errors while deploying the Metadata from BAS. It shows that deployment is unsucessful due to below errors.

 

MDK Validator - [MDK] Information: The property PerformFirstActionWithFullSwipe is only used on the iOS platform at [(57,7), (57,40)] in /home/user/projects/ASSETMGRMTADTA00P_2-70007426/Pages/Inventory/MaterialDocument/MaterialDocumentModalList.page is the most repeated error.

Can you please help me in rectifying this error.

Thanks,

Vasavi

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Inbuilt Retry option for HTTP Receiver Adapter
entry.content: In CF I cannot find this feature. Is it not available in CF?

entry.title: Re: ABAP 7.4 Syntax - FOR Loop iteration
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to create a new itab table where one of the current field will have a fixed value. 

data(lt_spfli_sel) = value ltt_spfli_sel( for ls_sp in lt_spfli ( MANDT = ls_sp-mandt CARRID = 'FR'
CONNID = ls_sp-CONNID COUNTRYFR = ls_sp-COUNTRYFR ).

This command works, but I want to avoid writing all the fields of itab lt_spfli via connid = ls_sp-connid contryfr = ls_sp-countryfr etc. 

The corresponding old coding would be

loop at lt_spfli assigning field-symbol(<ls_fs_spfli>).

<ls_fs_spfli>-carrid = 'FR'.

append <ls_fs_spfli> to lt_spfli_sel.

endloop.

entry.title: Re: EGF Cockpit - Design Custom Reports
entry.content:
Hello,

i am not able to open this document.

entry.title: How to change a date format when exporting employee time sap successfactors
entry.content: i am trying to change the format on import and export date ( to export Employee time) from MM/DD/YYYY to DD/MM/YYYY can you kindly assist

entry.title: Need help with Scope of availability check
entry.content:
Hii all,
I have a situation where -  i need to configure the scope of availability such that it include the shipping notifications for planned orders but not for production order during availability checks.

is it posisible to do that ??
I'm attaching the scope of availability i need to configure, can anyone suggest me where im doing wrong here.

entry.title: Customer Invoice Country Translation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In S/4HANA Public Cloud, where do you update the translation of a Country when printing invoices? We are a German customer and when printing the invoice for a Country in English, the German translation of the Country Name appears on the invoice instead of the English Country Name translation. 

Kind regards,

Andrew

entry.title: Problem with ''BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE'' inside LMBGBFSU ( FORM ausgabe )
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
i've got a problem at  ''BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE'.
I've got  an  custom field at MSEG, with type of Quan, with 9 possible decimal digits.
When i try to post document with quantity of digits 4 or more i'm getting an mistake "Account determination for entry AUM not possible". And if quantity of digits of this field is 3 or less posting works well.

I found a program a place deep inside ''BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE' where it happends.
I think the reason of it is table XZCXCM which filled by values inside LMBGBFSU( FORM ausgabe ).
Here it goes for loop at x156w. The values of x156w absolutely the same but values of XZCXCM fills differently.

 

 

 

FORM ausgabe USING a-bustw LIKE mseg-bustw.

  DATA: curtp   LIKE smbew-curtp,
        waers   LIKE smbew-waers,
        xsubs   TYPE zcxcm-xsubs,
        l_menge TYPE mseg-menge,
        l_dmbtr TYPE mseg-dmbtr,
        l_msgv1 TYPE symsgv,
        l_msgv2 TYPE symsgv.

* Unicode change
  DATA name_of_struct_comp(22) TYPE c.

  LOOP AT x156w WHERE bustw = a-bustw.
    IF x156w-xbgbb IS INITIAL OR ycurtp-umwae IS INITIAL.
      curtp = ycurtp-curtp.
      waers = ycurtp-waers.
      xsubs = ycurtp-xsubs.
    ELSE.
      curtp = ycurtp-umcur.
      waers = ycurtp-umwae.
      xsubs = ycurtp-umxsu.
    ENDIF.
    CLEAR: xzcxcm-vkwrt, xzcxcm-bualt, xzcxcm-lbbtr, xzcxcm-shkzm.

    ASSIGN (x156w-feldn) TO <betrag>.

    IF NOT sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
      MESSAGE e103 WITH x156w-feldn '<betrag>'.
    ENDIF.

    ASSIGN (x156w-shnam) TO <sh_kzg>.

    IF NOT sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
      MESSAGE e103 WITH x156w-shnam '<sh_kzg>'.
    ENDIF.
    IF NOT x156w-smnam IS INITIAL.
      ASSIGN (x156w-smnam) TO <sm_kzg>.
      IF NOT sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
        MESSAGE e103 WITH x156w-smnam '<sm_kzg>'.
      ENDIF.
      xzcxcm-shkzm = <sm_kzg>.
    ENDIF.
    xzcxcm-dmbtr = <betrag>.
    xzcxcm-shkzg = <sh_kzg>.
ENHANCEMENT-POINT ausgabe_01 SPOTS es_saplmbgb.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION     ausgabe_04 SPOTS es_saplmbgb.
*   note 673328: consistency for SHKZG ---------------------------------
*   SHKZG is supposed to be the same for BSX in current period and in
*   MSEG. Check it to detect inconsistencies before document is posted.
    IF   x156w-xbmat = x AND x156w-xumbw = space
*     check XZCXCM for lines with material update (XBMAT = X) which are
*     not the revaluation for postings to the prev. period (XUMBW = X)
      AND
          xzcxcm-shkzg <> space AND mseg-shkzg <> space
*     a value <> 0 is posted
      AND
         ( ( xzcxcm-shkzg <> mseg-shkzg AND x156w-buzid = m )
*           no transfer line: expecting MSEG-SHKZG = XZCZCM-SHKZG for
*           BUZID = M -> BSX for primary posting (Leitbuchung)
          OR
           ( xzcxcm-shkzg = mseg-shkzg  AND x156w-buzid = u ) ).
*           automatically created line for transfer: expecting
*           MSEG-SHKZG <> XZCZCM-SHKZG, identify line with BUZID = U
      IF mseg-shkzg = s.
        l_menge = mseg-menge.
        l_dmbtr = 0 - xzcxcm-dmbtr.
      ELSE.
        l_menge = 0 - mseg-menge.
        l_dmbtr = xzcxcm-dmbtr.
      ENDIF.
      WRITE l_menge UNIT mseg-meins TO l_msgv1.
      WRITE l_dmbtr CURRENCY mseg-waers TO l_msgv2.
      CONDENSE: l_msgv1, l_msgv2.
      MESSAGE e330 WITH l_msgv1 l_msgv2.
*     Preis der Warenbewegung wird negativ
    ENDIF.
*   end of consistency check for SHKZG ---------------------------------
END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.
    IF x156w-vorsl = vorsl_bsx.
      IF x156w-buzid = m.
        IF x156w-xumbw IS INITIAL.
          xzcxcm-bualt = bualt.
          xzcxcm-lbbtr = lbwert.
        ELSEIF NOT smbestu IS INITIAL.
          IF smbestd = smbestu.
            xzcxcm-bualt = buaum - bualt.
          ELSE.
            xzcxcm-bualt = bualt - buaum.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
      ELSEIF x156w-buzid = u.
        IF x156w-xumbw IS INITIAL.
          xzcxcm-bualt = umbua.
        ELSEIF NOT shumbsu IS INITIAL.
          IF shverbr = shumbsu.
            xzcxcm-bualt = umbum - umbua.
          ELSE.
            xzcxcm-bualt = umbua - umbum.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
    IF NOT x156w-xbmat IS INITIAL AND x156w-xumbw IS INITIAL.
      IF NOT vm07m-xvkbw IS INITIAL AND x156w-buzid = m.
        xzcxcm-vkwrt = mseg-vkwrt.
      ELSEIF NOT dm07m-umxvk IS INITIAL AND x156w-buzid = u.
        xzcxcm-vkwrt = dm07m-umvkw.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
    xzcxcm-cnt02 = x156w-cnt02.
    xzcxcm-buzid = x156w-buzid.
    xzcxcm-vorsl = x156w-vorsl.
    xzcxcm-xumbw = x156w-xumbw.
    xzcxcm-waers = waers.
    xzcxcm-curtp = ycurtp-curtm.
    xzcxcm-xsubs = xsubs.
ENHANCEMENT-POINT ausgabe_02 SPOTS es_saplmbgb.
    APPEND xzcxcm.
*   Extract data for cross-system goods movments to use the
*   valuation in this system on the other side.
*   Relevant only for the settlement posting (GBB).
*   Document currency is not needed.
    IF x156w-settlement = x AND xzcxcm-curtp <> '00'.       "sdp462
      CALL METHOD cl_mmim_cross_system=>fetch_valuation     "sdp462
        EXPORTING                                           "sdp462
          i_line_id = mseg-line_id                          "sdp462
          is_zcxcm  = xzcxcm.                               "sdp462
    ENDIF.                                                  "sdp462
  ENDLOOP.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT ausgabe_03 SPOTS es_saplmbgb.
ENDFORM.

 

 

The problem is with assigning fileds to  <sh_kzg> (32 line ) and <betrag> (26 line)

 

ASSIGN (x156w-feldn) TO <betrag>.
ASSIGN (x156w-shnam) TO <sh_kzg>.

, which lately inserting into XZCXCM.
i don't understand why at one case it becames empty and in another it equals to 'S'.
As i told field of x156w absolutely the same.

entry.title: Report/ Review newly added employee to worksheets in Comp/ VarPay
entry.content:
Hi all,

is it possible as a Comp Admin to view/ report employees that have been newly added to a worksheet in Compensation or Variable Pay because of the scheduled update worksheet job?

And is it also possible to get an information or to view/ report as Comp Admin when a new worksheet has been created for a manager because of the scheduled update worksheets job?

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Synchronization of newly added fields to existing DQM rules in SAP Master data Quality solution
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

we are trying to modify some of the rules we have created in SAP DQM. The system asks us to synchronize the changes after we add the fields. Unfortunately we are not able to find the option to sync the newly added fields. The UI keeps showing the changes although the generated decision tables get correctly. Please find attached image.

 

SAP Data Quality ManagementSAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Re: EWM blind cycle count by bin (not product and/or batch)
entry.content: bump

entry.title: Re: How to change a date format when exporting employee t...
entry.content:
Can you explain why you use MDF import for employee time?

What are you trying to achieve?

entry.title: Re: how to REALLY extend Adobe forms on public cloud?
entry.content:
Not really an answer but for the time being this is what I understood:

  • you are not supposed to add new datasources for gw-based forms in the cloud
  • extending an existing DPC in any meaningful way is also out of the question (sorry, no: a few basic fields here and there, each individually added, is not meaningful)

Honestly, I am not terribly impressed with this latest offering.

entry.title: Re: Time Sheet Workflow Based on Time Valuation Results
entry.content:
Hi Nevena

You can check via rule trace if your workflow is tuggered and set

Also this would not work in below cases

Some limitations where this will not work:

  • If your time type group (TTG) is a time collector, this will not work. Ensure that your TTG is not a collector

 

  • This will not work if you are using time type group value in rule which is part of time valuation "Filter Input groups ...." Ensure you use the TTG from valuation like "Aggregate and split " or "Deduct groups from input groups..."

 

BR

Neelesh

entry.title: Difference between Last quarter and last fiscal quarter
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Can you let me know how fiscal quarters is calculated (eg. last fiscal quarter) in display line items in general ledgers?

Please refer to the attached screenshots:

Last fiscal quarter: 31.12.2023 - 30.03.2024

Last quarter: 01.01.2024 - 31.03.2024

Thanks,

Kamil

entry.title: Re: what are the different types of blocks in sap for BP(...
entry.content:
Hi @KARTHIK-G ,
please open such a question in the area for SAP Materials Management which is in S/4.
In Marketing this is not covered.
Regards
Michael

entry.title: GroupBy CDS annotation is not working
entry.content:
I am using ABAP CDS and an Odata service to create a Fiori Elements app (List Report and Object Pages). I'm having issues with making the grouping annotation work correctly, while setting the grouping manually on the app works fine.

Here is the relevant code from the CDS:

 

 

[...]

@UI: {
  presentationVariant: [{
      groupBy: [ 'CriteriaType' ],
      sortOrder: {
        by: 'CriteriaType'
      },
      visualizations: [{
        type: #AS_LINEITEM
      }]
  }]
}
define view ZABAC_VOBJ_CRIT_NB_DEFAULT
  as select from ZABAC_VOBJECT_CRIT_NB
  association [*] to ZABAC_VCRILOADTYPE_TEXT    as _criteria_type_text on  $projection.CriteriaType = _criteria_type_text.CriteriaTypeId
  [...]
{
      [...]

      @ObjectModel.text.association: '_criteria_type_text'
      @ObjectModel.readOnly: true
      @EndUserText.label: 'Type de critère'
      // @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 25, importance: #HIGH }]
      _criteria.criteria_type       as CriteriaType,

      [...]
}

 

 

Here is how the table renders by default on the app (responsive table on an Object Page). Sorting does work correctly:

I can set the grouping manually inside the app, so grouping is possible with this table type:

The service has been refreshed and regenerated multiple times, and the metadata has been reloaded both on the backend side and on the Fiori Elements application. I also tried clearing/invalidating the caches, with no effect.

According to the documentation, the current version of the CDS should be enough to make this work. Am I missing something?

Thank you for your help

entry.title: Re: Hello all,It is possible to see the comment posted in...
entry.content:
Hello Nuria,

do you know our new time sheet approval center?

Time Sheet Approval Center - SAP Community

Streamlining Time Sheet Approvals in SuccessFactor... - SAP Community

We plan to include all comments even for the declined time sheets here. It is not quite sure if we can make it for the H2 release however.

Best regards

Volker

entry.title: Re: Error while HANA Cloud tenant in Python on SAP HANA C...
entry.content:
Hi dear colleague,

You're passing values directly into the ConnectionContext constructor without quotes, which will make Python interpret them as variables. Try to put the address  in quotes.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: System functions in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Why, in which context, do you execute those system-call,

  • Those are usually internally executed by standard SAP function
    (e.g. DYNP_VALUES_UPDATE and the like)
  • Which error code did you get
    (check the exception defined in the wrapper FM, e.g. INVALID_DYNPRONUMMER)

entry.title: Re: How create a session timeout with a countdown timer i...
entry.content:
In fact - in Workzone it is kind of timer in a form of dialog, which will pop out x min before session timeout. Both timeout value and number of minutes before timeout (to popup) is configurable.

As described in documentation - https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/configure-site-settings

entry.title: Re: How to add custom field to production order output
entry.content: how you add that z field? you should use custom fields and logic app.

entry.title: Re: How to change a date format when exporting employee t...
entry.content: I am exporting employee time to check when employees take leave

entry.title: Re: How to add custom field to production order output
entry.content: Hi @junwu the custom field was added with the 'Custom Fields and Logic' app as mentioned in my message. However, it is not showing in the production order output. Any thoughts?

entry.title: Re: how to REALLY extend Adobe forms on public cloud?
entry.content: cloud for the ...______ (insert answer here)

entry.title: Re: CDS-View for Attachment in Supplier Invoices
entry.content:
Dear all,

we have the same issue with our customer. How did you solve this topic? 

Thanks 

Enrico

entry.title: Re: How to add custom field to production order output
entry.content: ok, I think you have to adjust the form to show the additional field if I am not wrong. it won't show automatically.

entry.title: Re: Sales Organizational Structure - Ad Service Industry
entry.content:
It depends on the Customer business situation. 

If there is one Company Code and one VAT Registration and one Business type, One Sales Organization would be suffice. 

The different modes of serving / reaching the Customers would be separate Distribution Channels. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: How to add custom field to production order output
entry.content: Thanks for the response @junwu . Any idea on how to adjust the form? I have been looking for a way to adjust it but did not find any way yet.

entry.title: Reset payment media batch in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
• We do not have access to the "BANK_MERGE_RESET/Reset Payment Media" Batch Runs app in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
  • What is the remediation or fix functionality for payment batches in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
  • How can I reset a payment batch in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reset payment media batch in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please follow the resolution steps provided in https://me.sap.com/notes/3460654 "3460654 - Reset payment media batch in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud". 

 

Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to add custom field to production order output
entry.content: you can follow this https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/a2b387872d4743989769c432a482008d.html

entry.title: Re: Finding a Service in SPROXY transaction created in SA...
entry.content:
Figured out a way to do this,

Right click on the namespace and select ‘Create new Object’

 

Choose Service Provider and select Continue

 

 

 

Select the SI under your namespace and provide the Package/Transport# and finish.

entry.title: Re: Evaluation groups for Fixed Assets
entry.content:
These fields are obsolete for Public Cloud, you can add your own custom fields instead of. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/d005b509884040b18a9d6c092082a325.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Asset report fields
entry.content: You would need to check with your end user or accountant/auditor to see what fields they want to reference on a regular basis and create views for them. This really depends on the end user.

entry.title: RFID wristbands for FEC (Family Entertainment Center) Business
entry.content:
Hello,

One of our customer is looking for RFID wristbands for its FEC (Family Entertainment Center) Business Model and interested to know if SAP Customer Checkout supports such feature. The Customer currently uses SAP Business One and also uses SAP Customer Checkout POS.

The objective is to use RFID cards / tag / wristbands allowing guest to transact faster, reducing queues.

The customer wants Cashless RFID in a similar way to a prepaid card in which the guest load credit.

Please advise if this can be achieved using SAP Customer Checkout POS application or if there any plugins developed by the partners who can assist.

entry.title: Re: Setting Up Enterprise Organizational Management in S/4HANA Service
entry.content:
What about this restriction?

After you enabled the enterprise organizational model, the organization
related functions are not available in the following:

o Interaction Center (IC)

o Sales Force Support

o Email Response Management System (ERMS)

o Case Management

o Grantor Management

entry.title: Re: Hello all,It is possible to see the comment posted in...
entry.content: Hi Volker, thanks for the information. Yes, I have read about this new functionality planned for this release but as far as I know, time tracking license is mandatory for that, isn’t it? The solution I am trying to find is without time tracking enabled. I haven’t find a solución for that.

entry.title: Re: Hello all,It is possible to see the comment posted in...
entry.content: Thanks for your fast reply 😊 much appreciated

entry.title: Workflow e-mails are not displayed in the timeline tab in ticket
entry.content:
Hi all, 

is it possible to make workflow emails visible in the timeline tab in the ticket?
So we currently sending out workflow emails to the contact person for status "created", "in process" and "completed". But only the manually written e-mails and the replies from customer are visible in the timeline. No automatic workflow emails are there displayed. These I only see in the tab "workflow changes" as a user. 

For me as administrator I can check with "Administrator - Service & Social Media - Outbound E-Mail Monitoring". But this option is not possible for the end user. 

Thanks for help. 
Best regards,
Deborah

entry.title: Re: How to use the Script Operator in SAP Data Warehouse Cloud for Data Manipulation
entry.content:
Hi Philipp,

Thanks for a great post and examples for Python Script Operator. We are discussing here Data Flows - The Python Script Operator and why you should avoid it about it.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Setting Up Enterprise Organizational Management in S/4HANA Service
entry.content: The mentioned restrictions are still valid: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/c9b5e9de6e674fb99fff88d72c352291/c7291bd891ca424eb4f9b4bda83a521a.html

entry.title: Re: Issue in Inventory Audit Report
entry.content:
Hi,

Would recommend to go through the Guided Answer on the Inventory Audit Report.

https://ga.support.sap.com/dtp/viewer/index.html#/tree/3160/actions/48596

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3
entry.content:
Hello All,
Hash: 4d9816a315fe8e95b551e43fc77326eb3a18632b70636c4cd5b3b20774f50df6

entry.title: Re: Data Flows - The Python Script Operator and why you should avoid it
entry.content:
@XaviPolo Thanks for the information. It's good to see a proof directly in Datasphere. 

@christian_willi Thanks for reference blog post for the batches scenario. I've read it all.

Question to @christian_willi, @XaviPolo and everybody: So could we say that we should avoid using Python Script Operator for like transformation scenarios (conversion from Datetime to String, Extraction of Substrings) because of performance reasons but there is a use case for Python Script Operator like Task 1 - Classify numerical data as bins in @P_Plazi blog post How to use the Script Operator in SAP Data Warehouse Cloud for Data Manipulations

entry.title: Re: Please share the list of Business Processes in SAP PP.
entry.content:
Hi,

You can refer SAP Best practices solution scenarios using SAP Signavio Process Navigator.

Refer the below blog on SAP Signavio Process Navigator.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-signavio-process-navigator-in-action/ba-p/13570823

entry.title: Re: How to add column based on existing columns to existing table without header line?
Re: Debugger getting detached in SAP SAM

entry.title: Re: Building SAP Asset Manager Client (MDK-23.8.7 & MDK P...
entry.content: Are you also using the SAM2310 Branding SDK?

entry.title: Re: Could we use one SOM with two different Catalogs on t...
entry.content:
Hi Francois,

thanks a lot for the answer. I appreciate it. Yes, as you mentioned I should wait for some SOM experts to give me more insights.

Best Regards,

Doris

entry.title: How to unlock a user with BAPI from JAVA using JCO in a CUA target system
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm writing a code in JAVA using JCo to connect to the CUA system and to a user unlock using the bapi BAPI_USER_UNLOCK.
Until now I'm able to unlock the user account in CUA itself, so how can I specify to unlock the user in a specific CUA system member.?

Is it not possible to specify the execution somehow using a RFC?

Thanks a lot for your help.

entry.title: 1H 2024 Release Issue - Disappear the text "Select the action to perform" in Import and Export Page
entry.content: After H1 2024 release disappear text "Select the action to perform" in import and export page.

entry.title: Re: Workflow e-mails are not displayed in the timeline ta...
entry.content:
I did found the solution!
Mark the checkbox "create email activity" in step 3 of the workflow and then you see it within the timeline 🙂
